results.name: modal
results.description: Spells which give you your choice from two or more distinct functions.

results.name: modal inverse choices
results.description: Spells where the modal options are: X, Mirror of X

results.name: mogg
results.description: Goblins from Rath, used as footsoldiers during the Phyrexian invasion of Dominaria. Noted for their sharp teeth and low intellect

results.name: moku
results.description: A wandering musician who plays the drum.

results.name: mona lisa
results.description: A famous painting by Leonardo da Vinci, depicting a smiling woman.

results.name: mongseng
results.description: A briefly visited plane that served as the inspiration for, and was replaced by, Tarkir.

results.name: monitor
results.description: A screen, not a person in the act of monitoring something (or a monitor lizard.)

results.name: monster and bonder
results.description: An Ikorian human bonder depicted with their monstrous best friend.

results.name: montage
results.description: Multiple elements in the same image used to convey a passage of time.

results.name: monument
results.description: A symbolic structure representing something of importance. See also [sculpture](/tags/artwork/sculpture) or [statue](/tags/artwork/statue)

results.name: moogle
results.description: (Usually) a short, white, furry pom pom race of creatures from Final Fantasy, kupo.

results.name: morbid
results.description: Effects that care about at least one creature dying this turn.

results.name: more expensive than mv
results.description: The actual cost you pay for an effect (or for an alternate mode) will often be higher than the card's mana value.

results.name: moriok
results.description: Black-aligned humans of Mirrodin, found in Mephidross.
